"Bei Bistu Shein" (Yiddish: ביסטו שיין‎, You're Beautiful") popular Yiddish song composed Jacob Jacobs (lyricist) Sholom Secunda (composer) 1932 Yiddish comedy musical, Would Could Yiddish, Lebn Lost Nisht, "You could live, they don't you"), which closed after season Parkway Theatre Brooklyn, York City).
score song transcribed Yiddish title "Bay bistu sheyn".
Over time, song grossed some million, with Secunda Jacobs missing significant royalties.
1961, copyright song expired, ownership reverted Secunda Jacobs, signed contract with Harms, Inc., securing proper royalties.
item consist file bonus file), melody track mp3, backing (play along) track mp3.
